scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:resume && vite build
scripts.build:resume: for f in src/resume/resume*.typ; do typst c --font-path src/resume/fonts "$f" "static/$(basename "${f%.typ}.pdf")"; done
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --manifest-path src/lib/poker-solver/Cargo.toml && cp src/lib/poker-solver/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/poker_solver.wasm src/lib/playgrounds/poker/
